positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration featuring a cluster of stylized celestial bodies—crescent moons, radiating stars, and orbiting comets—composed in a perfect circular mandala formation. The style should be clean linework mixed with vibrant, ethereal gradients, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets modern cosmic abstract art. Use a limited, harmonious palette of deep indigo, celestial gold, matte lavender, and bright cyan. The composition must be centralized, symmetrical, and easily readable when printed on fabric. High contrast outlines and negative space are crucial. Vector art quality, perfect symmetry, elegant silhouette, highly detailed, scalable.
negative: photograph, realism, text, logo, watermark, artifact, messy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, blur, out of focus, low detail, busy background
